exercises.title: Meet array
exercises.body: The letter for array is 𐑼 — the soft, unstressed “-er” you hear trailing off the end of better and over. It's one of the most common letters in Shavian, since English loves that ending.

exercises.caption: Sound it out — what does this say?

exercises.title: Meet ear
exercises.body: The letter for ear is 𐑽, the sound in ear itself, and in here.

exercises.caption: Sound it out — what does this say?
